review_text:
The amenities near the office could do with a bit more cleaning and 1 or two more dump sites for the toilets would be handy.
Overall a good park for a great price. (I can only talk about powered caravan sites)

The amenities are great, and the location — both the beach and the city access — is perfect. Unfortunately, it also seems to be a very easy place for thieves to access other people’s belongings.

On our second night, two of our kids’ pro scooters were stolen from the deck of our cabin. We reported it to the office, but the response felt very cold and dismissive. We were simply told that we should take care of our belongings. What we didn’t know was that the park itself does not seem very safe, and there are almost no security measures in place — not even a single camera at any of the entrances.

Apparently, the only real security is putting absolutely everything inside your locked cabin.

Two days later, while walking at night, we saw some teenagers moving between cabins and then running out through the main entrance. It gave the impression that this kind of thing happens regularly, yet nothing is being done about it.

We reported the theft to the police, but sadly this will probably become just another statistic, and my kids will never see their scooters again.
Excellent camping location.  Very nice campgrounds. Definitely suited for rv, or tent camping. Or stay in one of their cabins. Steps from the beach. Great amenities.
Great park, facilities and location.
Very impressed,  would love to come back for longer next time.

Excellent experience. 15 mins notice to get a great booking service from staff. Paid the extra couple of dollars for the ensuite area a site and honestly the cleanest, most well appointed, high water pressure shower I’ve found! Great staff, big sites, awesome amenities and the cafe out the front has good coffee, tasty food and is affordable. 10/10 will stay again.
clean, organised, calm, friendly front desk, super close to the beach!
Clean camping resort.
Corrimal beach is a fun time for dogs!

Reasonably spacious Cabin (was in cabin 2, had 2bdrooms) was clean, has clean kettle, oven, stove, microwave, Blow dryer, 6seater dining table, FULL SIZE MIRROR.. (in main room), BBQ, fly spray... etc..

Beach is on your doorstep basically.. it has multiple entry points and is lovely.
You can hear the waves at night..

Unfortunatly I didn't get a chance to explore the park much but the cafe was great and has lovely staff.. looks pretty and maintained. apparently there is shops close by, bout a 5min walk..

If I was to be picky, I would say put blankets on the beds, not just the sheet and bedspread. And possible add a side table or small table for coffee in lounge area.

Beautiful area.
Overall great stay, I will be back..
Helpful friendly staff, fantastic location, clean amenities

Upon arriving at the park it appeared to be neat and tidy and the lady at checkin was beautiful. There we two vans camping together. We both requested  drive through sites. Because we had a dog we couldn’t have one which was fine however my sister was allocated one as she didn’t have a pet. He site was quite close to the front of the park nest and tidy and so well kept. Ours was at the back of the park due to having a dog. Lots of permanents around us, lawns unkept. Very very untidy. Disappointing stay would never stay again. Needs a good clean up
Great location and well-kept grounds, but the energy here was all wrong. If that matters to you, consider elsewhere.

Clean amenities block, generous size site.
Near patrolled Beach.

We were close to the area and rather than continue driving we decided to book a night at Corrimal. The staff were lovely and helpful. Our cabin was modest and cosy, very clean and comfortable. We were a very short walk from the beach. The park is extremely well maintained and set out. Walking distance to local shops and a short drive to bigger shopping areas. There is also a very nice cafe on a large grass area adjacent to the park entry. Beautiful breakfast at a very reasonable price and good coffeee. Very sweet staff. We were so comfortable we were able to rebook our cabin for a second night. Will absolutely return.

We were really disappointed with this park.  There is steep access to some sites making entry and exit difficult without gouging the ground with the drawbar. We had advised staff on arrival that we were a long van and long vehicle they said the site would be good. Our site also formed a large deep muddy puddle under the awning that did not drain away.  We were walking through 6cm of mud and water to get in the van.  This is not an experience we would repeat.
Great camping. Dog friendly  next to the beach.
Easy access to the beach. Large sites. The playground needs maintenance, amenities would modern and clean.

Council run, Old tired facilities that really need an overhaul. TBH Stayed in better equipped Showgrounds. Good location close to beach and bowls club. Won two meat trays at the Sunday raffles there which was the highlight of the stay
Nice spot for a caravan, good amenities, and great location. Nice people about and feels very secure. I'd recommend it.
Competent friendly staff; flat grassy campsites, spotless amenities; perfect location 100 m walk to the beach. Short 5 min walk to Bowls Club for good value meals
Great spo
Nice large and well maintained grass/ lawn to each plot for caravans or camping.
Everything is great and everyone are friendly and helpful.
Great spot
Dog friendly is one section, but full for our size so opened up sites on "main rd" which can be busy when you are manoeuvring. Big sites.
A fantastic park that was kept pristine clean even through peak season. Loved our short stay
Powered site. Week long stay. Friendly staff.  Clean amenities.  Great location.  Clean beach. Cafe on site. Bowlo walking distance. Woollies a 7 min drive away. Will definitely be back.
We've been here multiple times for the last 20 years, love it😀
We had a powered site easy access for caravan good clean amenities
Such perfect place to go right on the beach best location

Stayed in a powered site. Great park. Lovely clean amenities,  BBQ and very close proximity to the beach, ocean pool and river. Close to shops and clubs. Easy bike track to follow.  Staff very quick to respond to questions or help. Have already made 2 more bookings for the future. This will now be my go to park for a relaxing time away.

We have just spent a lovely 7 nights here and would happily stay longer! Our site was massive and the park is in a terrific location with fabulous walking bike park alongside it to take you either into Wollongong or along the beaches.||All staff were friendly and helpful and the onsite cafe well priced with delicious coffee.||We appreciated that while checking in we were told to make sure we kept our caravan and belongings secure with good quality chains and locks - we did and did not have a problem. ||We will be returning to explore more of beautiful Wollongong.

They accommodated us on New years day with literally an hours notice for a camp-site for two nights. Absolutely stoked to find this last minute stay. Facilities were great  location was great, service was great. We will be back!
I stayed in a cabin at Corrimal Caravan Park over Christmas. It was so relaxing. The park is great for families and friends, right on the beach. Thank-you for a great stay
Great location, beautiful beach, great service

Nice place.  It is a shame people treat amenities like shit. Throwing dirty toilet paper and toilet brushes around male toilets. quite disgusting. I guess there is some families with some very disgusting houses going by this experience. People  Using bins as a public mattress dump sites. Nice spot though.

Fabulous unpowered site at Corrimal Beach Tourist Park.  Camp kitchen is EXCELLENT - probably the best we’ve been to plus Block 4 amenities are really modern, clean with great shower pressure. Location is excellent - right on the beach. The camp is quiet with other site guests friendly - reception team are awesome also!

A lovely family and dog friendly during off school holidays,  caravan park.Clean facilities even when busy well maintained sites, roads and well placed bins.This would be a fantastic place if dogs were allowed during school hols.
Beautiful little cafe with fantastic food at affordable prices & the staff are super lovely

Great park clean and tidy
Friendly staff

Cool as great timeWe had a truly wonderful experience. It's always a delight to hear about occasions that are both enjoyable and memorable. We  were able to create lasting recollections from this time. May our future endeavors bring us similar feelings of happiness and satisfaction. It is truly rewarding when activities are so positively received.
I absolutely love this place, great spot, lovely vibes, great service, close to beach.
Nice place close to beach over the sand dunes and your there

My first and last stay.
This park is very substandard. Caravan sites need really urgent maintenance, with suncen dirt patches needing grass.
The amenities block needs major repairs including the lock on the men's door, with corroded numbers almost impossible for older people to read.
No soap holders in showers, broken latches on doors, and generally run down with dirty ceilings.
The beach has confusing dog allowance signage, with allowance at one access, but non-allowance 50 mtrs apart for the same beach !!
Stayed on a site that was close to the beach access so great location
Never been before, just for an overnight stay, lovely and clean, a great location, more than happy to come back here in the future.
We come every year for the past 3 yrs. Amazing place
Ill be back, awesome

Great location, beach access from park. Easy walk to little shopping area with great cafe. Park is clean and tidy, well managed by friendly staff. There's even a cafe on site and walk to bowls club for dinner. On the great walking path in the area. Close to rock pool. Terrific find has it all for a relaxing stay.
Very tidy and clean park
Stayed 2 nights in our RV. Great location, park nice & clean as we're the amenities. Will be back for sure
Nice place for camping 🏕 and quick access to beach with amazing sunshine view in the morning 🌞 ☀️
Nice, clean,  quiet near beach ⛱️ ocean swimming pool. Love it.

Absolutely Appalling Stay – Avoid at All Costs!
We booked this caravan park expecting a relaxing getaway, but instead got a front-row seat to the Drumkit from Hell. One evening inconsiderate guests dragged their drumkit outside and played for hours with zero regard for anyone else. And what did the park management do? Absolutely nothing. No warnings, no rules enforced – just a total lack of care for their paying guests.
To make matters worse, these same guests thought it was perfectly fine to block the road with their giant Cadillac, making it impossible for others to come and go. Again, staff did nothing. Apparently, if you're loud and selfish enough, you get a free pass here.
Now for the accommodation: we had to make our own beds upon arrival – not what you'd expect when you're paying good money. The pillows were flat and useless, the kind you'd expect in a $10 hostel, not a supposedly “family-friendly” caravan park. And don’t even bother trying to connect to the internet- there is none!
Location is great, Wright on the beach,  park very clean and tidy, good size van sites.

Corrimal Beach Tourist Park is a spacious and well-maintained holiday park located just north of Wollongong, offering an excellent base for road-trippers and families. The park has plenty of room for motorhomes, caravans, and campers, as well as comfortable cabins for those preferring fixed accommodation.

Guests can enjoy BBQ facilities and open spaces perfect for relaxing with friends. The park staff are known for being friendly and helpful, making check-in and stays smooth and welcoming.

One of the biggest highlights is its direct access to Corrimal Beach, which is ideal for a peaceful morning walk along the sand or catching the sunrise over the Pacific Ocean. For convenience, there’s a supermarket nearby to stock up on supplies.
One of the few caravan parks in the are that accepts dog. Great initiative and much appreciated.

Location on the beach is beautiful even if it is in a low desirable area. The ladies in the office when we checked in were super polite and helpful. The roads around the park need some work, our standard hight car did bottom out on some of humps/dips if you didn’t take them at the right angle, We were booked into a ‘deluxe’ two bedroom cabin. There was nothing deluxe about our cabin! One of the steps onto the patio was damaged a little, the BBQ on the patio didn’t look ok to cook on. Inside the cabin some of the wooden chairs at the dining room didn’t feel very stable to sit on, all of the furniture was miss matched and really quite old, there was a lingering smell of paint that didn’t seem to dissipate even with windows open. All of the mattresses are different sizes some thicker some really thin, none of them comfortable and all the pillows were also paper thin. There is a small smart tv in the lounge room although the park has no wifi (at the price we paid I did expect to have free wifi) so you can’t use any of the streaming services on it, they do have a DVD player but there’s no where to rent any DVDs to watch. The park itself is fine I think if you’re In a caravan or just camping but absolutely not worth the VERY high price tag for a cabin. We could have easily stayed in a very nice hotel for the same price if we weren’t travelling with extended family in vans and all wanted to be in the same place for a family reunion.
Nice , clean, friendly, and right on the water.
Great place Roomy clean huge park clean On the beach Quiet Close to town Definitely go again Value for  money
Great service, only here for a couple of nights so did not get to use all the facilities  but clean , warm cabins. Quite at night, great location.

A beautiful park, with extra bonuses for walking, fishing and surfing. Could improve by having increase temperature on hot water shower and cleanliness in ablutions. As with all parks we have visited there is a lack of rubbish bins to help keep the park tidy. Overall highly recommended but they could improve on off season pricing.

Great views of the mountains. We stayed in a 3 Bedroom cabin which came with 4 single beds and a queen bed. Very spacious but in need of updating. There is no pool here but there is a rock pool nearby. They don't offer wifi here but we were offered DVD'S lol. Lovely staff here and smooth check-in.
However, we always found there were ants on the kitchen bench near the sink.
Spacious caravan park

Council run caravan park, so cheaper rates. There is no pool, but direct access to the beach, 5 minutes walk to ocean filled concrete pool at Towradgi. Lock up your gear because like most van parks you get people wandering through up to no good
Great Views even better people on site.

A nice campsite close to the beach, even ground and easy to peg the tents down. Great kitchen and recently done up amenities, though the shower pressure is very low. Only fault is the giant speed bumps, big cars are fine but I still scraped the bottom of my sedan going very slowly 😢.
Lovely staff. Great and clean facilities.
Took my capervan beautiful spot
We stayed at one of the powered campsites -  the facilities around the tourist were great! The shops and cafes are also super close as well as a patrolled beach :))

Because guests have to wash dishes etc before they leave, they dont do a good job. So while the cabin appeared to be clean, it was not. The beds had to be made up which is the last thing I want to do on a mini-break!
There is plenty of space, it's close the the beach.
Great location. Clean amenities. Very noisy neighbours in the cabins spoilt our stay as they partied til after 11pm

For the price, $35 unpowered tent site, it wasn’t great. There’s no WiFi and there were groups partying loudly until after midnight two nights in a row, which makes me think that they don’t have a night patrol going around the tent sites. But the bathrooms were clean and the beach was close!

Beautiful spot, great park and fabulous service! Amenities were spotless and our site was great, we will be heading back that way soon & hopefully stay much longer! I really liked the layout of the park, with the cabins & vans mixed throughout. Thank you!!

Good, clean camping facilities and BBQs. New toilet and showers with hot water. Enclosed camp kitchen with 2 fridges, stoves, some pots and pans, kettle, microwave, tv. Ice available on site. Walk to patrolled beach.
Great caravan Park. Really big sites
Large park in great location with good access to the beach. Short walk to Towradgi Bowling Club for dinner. Only dump point is a fair way from sites at front of the park.
Lovely sites, great staff, dog friendly. Lovely clean amenities.
Dog friendly and walking distance to beach

We parked our campervan here overnight.
Dog friendly
Close to the beach and off leash before 9 and after 6.
The amenities are clean and well looked after.
And the staff are friendly.
Beautiful park, amenities were well maintained and nice. No complaints

Awesome location. Heaps of great facilities. Fantastic staff, right o  the beach and the place to be to use as base camp to visit the surrounding areas. Super close to shops, restaurants, cafes and anything else you might need.

Really enjoyed our stay but when we dropped our key in the lady looked spooked and exclaimed to me she wasn’t expecting any strange  people so early at 9:30 in the morning.A really disappointing reason why I won’t be back.
Dog friendly

Great park, close to Wollongong but quiet and isolated for the full getaway experience. Beach is a short walk away
Staff are super friendly and helpful.
Grounds and sites are well maintained and clean.
Very affordable.
Great caravan park if you have dogs, good facilities.
Great caravan park , very reasonably priced for its proximity to the water . We had a great stay and will be back .
1st class friendly service and facilities.  Right on Corrimal Beach

I love this place and was always my go to when visiting family in Wollongong. I don’t like that they have a minimum 3 night stay here so I can no longer enjoy a quick getaway here. Not everyone is able to stay 3 days and I’m sad that I’ll no longer be able to stay here for a while! Hopefully one day you will change this policy back to normal again as it’s a lovely place and I do miss it. Wanted to stay a day on the weekend but have to look elsewhere :(
Stayed in a beautiful spot with our campervan!! Great amenities, nice and clean!!👍👍❤❤ Highly recommend!!

Bathrooms were always dirty, and our neighbours' kids' bikes were stolen from the park, and the caravan across from us had people going through their stuff at 2am . Great location, but I'm just disappointed with some issues and the park.

Great location, on the way to or from Sydney. We came for one night to rest during the roadtrip, stayed for 3 nights! The proximity to the beach and the great atmosphere of the campsite really made us stay!

Pros: large park
large sites
Easy Access to beach
Little foodworks out the back gate
Great Bike Tracks both north and south

Cons: WIFI is awfully painfully slow... if your planning to
work bring your starlink with you. For a place the
size of wollongong this was really surprising.
If you want takeaways or coffee's you have to drive
everywhere
Grt beach & a relaxing place to catch-up _ @ the cafe
Pretty good caravan park. Had a powered site, dog friendly, will go again

Beware of this caravan park. We were warned upon checking in at reception to lock everything single thing up as there is so much theft. The permanent site holders seem to think they are the only ones in the park, often congregating in their cliques and partying till 4am, rang the night number and they said something would be done and it wasnt…clearly all friends. This continued 3 nights in a row, i gave up complaining. The only thing going for it is the location to the beach. The surrounding community isn’t the nicest of areas, alot of alcohol and drug affected people on the streets between the back gate and the little foodworks shop, actually quite confronting to walk here. The noise is extremely excessive all the time in the park. The facilities are average but clean. It is like a very rundown low socio economic area amongst the permanent site holders up the back, could be different in the cabin area. Would i stay again? Absolutely not.
Cleaning tidy amenities  friendly staff enjoyed stay
Love this place only down side is the showers are terrible, great position, can have the dogs, close to shops, quiet at night.
Awesome place,with patrolled beach

We always stay in an ensuite powered site.
We love the approximately to the beach.
Friendly staff and close to supermarket in Woonona
Needs a little more attention to cleaning details...
Love it definitely will be back

Large very clean place, right on the beach.  We stayed off-season in our own van and had a large area with room all around us. They didn't try to cram us all in together, which was so great. The bathrooms were clean and large. The kitchen near us had two large fridges, three cook tops a large TV, microwave and table. ( pictures added)
Has cabins to stay in also and some of the usual long term residents.
Well kept place with good communication from the staff.

One of the best camping grounds close to sydney(1 hr drive). Great camping location just next to the beach.

This was our second visit to this tourist park. The last was in 2019.

Well maintained and very clean facilities. There is laundry room and shared kitchen as well.

Overall very good value for money. 35$ a night is a steal.

An overnight stay in an on-site cabin. Late check-in (6-6:30pm) with a code to pick up keys. Checkout by 10am the next day. Clean and tidy, toiletries and teabags, milk provided. Towels and bed made.
Unfortunately the cafe next door is closed, so I had a cup of tea in the cabin and drove nearby for coffee.
Stayed with a bunch of friends renting out cabins. Was an amazing weekend. Everything was clean, service great. Location beautiful

Won’t stay here again. Nothing against the park but the area is full of scum. We had our mountain bikes stolen overnight worth $6,000. Yes they were locked up. But the park has multiple public access points and they cut through the locks on our bikes. Obviously a bad area if things are being stolen even when they are locked up. A devastating end to our trip. Have stayed at multiple caravan parks with our bikes and haven’t even locked them up. Was told by reception on arrival to lock things up so this is obviously a regular occurrence. The people in the community have ruined this area for us. Note to other travellers, don’t bring anything you value.
We stayed in two of the holiday cottages. The accommodation is clean, comfortable and well-maintained.
Very nice van park in a great location

Clean professional run caravan park . |Everything  about the place is great .  The location the friendly staff .  Clean amenities. Only down side it rained for 22 days of the 32 days I stayed lol and the fishing was not as good as normal lol .|But I would highly recommend  staying here

This caravan park is clean staff are very friendly and had the ability for 2 night stay at short notice. Kid friendly within close proximity to the beach and great walks. Highly recommend and will be staying here again when up this way

Staff were helpful.
Amenities were relatively clean

Office staff were extremely helpful and kind as we kept extending our stay due to a sick family member. Thank you for making our stay as stress free as possible. Great park, minimal noise, close to the beach and the doggo loved it as much as us.
We stayed on a powered site with our camper trailer in off season
Not clean at all
Full did not stay
The staff are lovely, the location near the beach is lovely… but there was a LOT of petty crime during our 7 week stay. I wouldn’t return based on the crime.

Nice quite park.Beach over the hill. Stayed for 2 nights then put in another 2 nights with water and power. Rates are excellent  to have a caravn.Plenty of space for caravans. Good for stop over but need  to book or tak a chance there is a space for your caravan. Toilets showers laundry are all very clean.
Nice spot to rest your head. Up there for a competition and it was good to come back for a rest

We booked a site for 2 nights, we have a dog, put us in the boon docks on a tiny awkward site right next to another camper,  couldn't even put awning out as would be on their site. There were soooo many other free sites all around us. The grey water has to run up hill, sites uneven. Wouldn't return
Only complaint was lack of lights at night, difficult to walk in the dark.

Staff  friendly  and  helpful,  very  large  caravan/cabin  park  on  ocean  frontage,  dog  friendly  sites,  3  amenities  blocks  all  modernised,  mostly  good  size  grassed  sites  for  vans,  150 yards  to  small  shopping  centre,  SLS  club  on  beach,  good  cycling  paths  north  and  south,  rates  reasonable  out  of  school  holidays,  enjoying  our  stay.

Great Service
Best spot ,the grassed areas are well maintained, beach access was awesome too.
Pet friendly.
Overall our stay was enjoyed, the staff are really polite and welcoming
The bathrooms were clean and the extra hanging hooks was the best ever lol .
We will definitely return .
Thanks Guys
always stay here when in Wollongong it's fantastic
Beautiful park, very clean

This is a gem of a spot!  We had only booked 1 night as we were travelling through, but within the hr booked another night.  Facilities were exceptional, clean and updated, van site we had was large and plenty of space, staff were friendly and welcoming.  Great security - right on the beach.  We enjoyed the easy access to Wollongong’s bike paths along the beach.  Beautiful backdrop of the mountains.  We’ll be back 😎

We had a powered site, and the only problem is there is a specific dog area, but none where you can stay hitched. We had a family emergency in Victoria really needed to stay hitched. Park was nearly empty. Would definitely stay again.

Highly recommend this caravan park . We really enjoyed our stay here in our caravan . Very large generous spots with heaps of toilet blocks . Cleaned thoroughly daily . The staff here are fantastic to deal with also . Beautiful beach and great park for the kids . :)
Nice area, beach is great
We stayed on a powered site in Dog friendly section.

Best value for money. Amenities are extremely clean and large, and there are no ques for a shower in the morning 10/10. Love the beach access, staff amazing. Powered sites are very spacious. Dog friendly. Very clean and green park. Highly recommend

We had a powered site and were extremely pleased with the service from the staff at Corrimal Beach Tourist Park. They were pleasant over the phone as we rang to make sure our doggies were welcome too, which they were.
The amenities were well kept and extremely clean. The bathrooms smelt divine.
The lawns were well maintained as was the remainder of the park.
We would highly recommend this park to others.
Lovely location. Comfortable cabins.
Perfect getaway..near the beach and town..very clean park..A+++

Good tourist park. We got a unpowered site, was very big, had a water point, was very close to amenities. It was pouring like crazy for 48 h and still the grassy area was walk and driveable so good draining. Affordable laundry machines  clean toilets and showers, Showers were powerful and hot. Overal good value for money.
Great caravan sites, well equipped camp kitchen,  clean toilets and showers,  close to bike paths,  not far from SeaCliff bridge.
Great location if interested in the beach. Was fairly quiet for April school holidays. We had a large site on the Hill. Amenities were fine. Cafe not open.

Let me preface this review clearly stating I did not stay at this beach park. I had a lot of communications with the reception staff. I had booked a cabin for the Easter long weekend. I had inquired both verbally and via email prior to booking if the one night deposit was refundable and what were the terms of cancellation. Their cancellation policy on their website is worded vaguely, so I wanted to clarify. I was informed on multiple occasions that if I canceled prior to 2 weeks from date of arrival, I would be refunded my deposit. Unfortunately, I had to cancel my booking a month before easter. I inquired about how they would refund my deposit and I was told that there was no refund as per their policy online. Luckily I had an email stating that my deposit will be refunded to me if I canceled before the 2 weeks. That is the only reason I got my deposit refunded to me. if I did not have that written communication, I would not have received my deposit. I believe this to be very fraudulent behavior as I was told verbally, before booking, that I will get my deposit refunded if cancelled before 2 weeks of arrival. Anyone else who would have booked based on this assurance from the staff verbally, would have been severely disappointed if they cancelled within the cancellation period. Be sure to get everything in writing. And I also suggest the team at corrimal beach park have a review of their cancellation policy with the entire staff so that everyone is on the same page and guests are not being given misleading information.
Large unpowered site reasonably priced at $34 night days before Easter

Great location, big park quality service and facilities.
Bikepacker note, close to supermarket and train station plus bike shop in corrimal
We camped, it was a great location
It's a really good location, staff were so friendly and helpful. The sites (we camped,) we big and very well set out , it's also pet friendly 😀

Great caravan park. Only let down were the poorly set out showers, the nozzles are built into the wall and can't be moved and the spray is such you have to get very close to the wall but when you do that your body presses the faucet closed, no soap holders, water goes everywhere. Otherwise the park is very good.

Era la primera vez que íbamos de camping en Australia, y la experiencia fue hermosa.
Los baños nuevos y limpios, tiene una cocina con heladeras (es de uso común, y alguien tomó nuestra bolsa de comida 😣) y bbq.
Esta muy cerca de la playa.
Lo único que nos hubiera gustado, es que como nuestra carpa estaba al lado de un faro de luz, que lo apagaran a la noche, para dormir mejor.

Lovely park, we had powered site.  Staff friendly and helpful.  Some sites are strange shapes but there's room for van, annexe and car. The amenities were clean and there's a great camp kitchen with BBQ, hot plates, fridge. Quiet position away from highway,  backs onto the beach with several access points. Cafe next to van sites for coffee and light food during the day. No wifi in park but there is at Cafe. An ocean pool is only 500m down the beach.  Great park, recommended.

We tent camped, the lady at the office assigned us a camping spot in full hot sunlight.
I don't know why since there were much nicer spots available.
After it got dark this huge bright light came on close to our camp, it was extremely annoying.

We hebben hier 6 nachten gestaan. De camping in rustig en heel ruim. Je loopt zo het strand op om te zwemmen.
Sanitair was netjes en werd goed bijgehouden. Enige punt van kritiek vind ik dat er een aantal soort daklozen ofzo waren, die sliepen daar ook ergens op het park en hingen de hele dag een beetje rond bij de campkitchen midden op het park en dat gaf geen fijn gevoel.

Super sauberer Campingplatz, sehr groß, Marmor in den Bade-Amenities (Block 4), so etwas habe ich noch nicht gesehen. Kontaktfreie Toilettenspülung ist für kleinwüchsige Menschen schwer erreichbar. Dusche mit 4 Minuten Zeitschaltuhr.
Kurzer Weg zum tollen Strand mit perfekten Wellen zum Body Boarden und gutem Sandboden zum Joggen. Wir waren nur eine Nacht dort, können uns aber vorstellen, auf unserem Rückweg wieder dort abzusteigen.
Beautiful place close to everything we needed cabins were exellent clean and spacious staff helpful just a great holiday place Thankyou to the staff

ame here for 2 nights - because we had to - in our campervan trip due to its ratings and position close to the sea.|Easy to book online and when we arrived we had an okay welcome, but o chance to pick the place we want -  because theoretically it was full. The reality was different with a number of sites being vacant. The sites were a good size and had grass plus there were paths to the beach and a code to get into and out of everything. area. |We asked to be put in a quiet place, but unfortunately were given a place in the middle of a large group of party people with multiple sites, who were continually walking through our site, playing games and fighting on our site, plus we’re up the after 1.30am with their party. We asked to move and were grudgingly moved to a different site with the assistant saying that the group in question are leaving and that most of the sites are fully booked and unavailable.|Location is great - next to the sea with a little walk through the dunes to a beautiful beach and  paths to it.|The toilets are very clean and function well, but there not many of them, while the showers are really good. There was no WiFi at all which was disappointing.|Good value for money @$68 for a powered site for 2 nights. Would be 5* if we had better attitude from the reception assistant and had WiFi.
good spot next to the beach, not far from everything
we stayed 3 nights. Bathrooms, kichen and laundry were very clean and it was quiet at night. A little shop is 10min by foot.
The double booking of cabins is a joke 😳
nice place
Whatta holiday, nice family atmosphere, heaps to do, reasonably priced, thank you.

Schöner Camping gleich direkt sm Strand.
Leider sind die Sanitäranlagen ziemlich veraltet.

This review is just for camp-site and amenities. I can't review on cabins as we did not stay there.

We just came back from the Corrimal Beach Tourist park camping. We stayed in our tents. The common amenities block was exceptionally clean and well maintained. Kitchen had fridge, microwave, sink etc, clean and tidy. Laundry had dryer and washer with $5 charge. Ground was cleaned, well maintained, no mosquitoes at night/day. BBQ area was nice and every day they clean the BBQ. Perfect location to beach patrolled by life guards.
Can't ask more!!

Been camping here for a very long time, love the location and the place,  bbqs, play grounds, beach, waking track, such a great place. I have had a cabin as well and that was also a really good option

Sehr schöne Anlage, Campingplatz, weiträumig, platzgebend und nicht überlaufen
Direkt am Strand
Toiletten und Duschen sehr sauber und gepflegt und modern
Beautiful location and great access to beach. 👍
Great place to stay with pets

Good place by a beautiful beach.
We spent there 2 nights with motor caravan before the holidays.  It was very quiet, the endless beaches around are beautiful.

Fantastic location and good amenities. I stayed here in a campervan and I thought the prices were reasonable and the area was quiet and tidy. The campsite is adjacent to a path which goes right to the beach, and the toilet block is nearby.

I was surprised the camp kitchen had nothing to offer other than benches and a communal fridge though. No appliances or pots and pans. There was a BBQ, but it was the same flat style as you get in public parks.
Loved this park so much! so big and spread out, amenities were new and clean, big beach was a few steps away, huge sites in a secure park. Highly recommend!

Short Q&A.
Ammens ✅clean as.
Park Wifi. ❌.
Mobile reception ✅5G & 4G. (2-3bar).
Pets✅. Allowable times vary, check with park.
Shops✅.walking distance.
Beach.👍👌✅.
Patrons.✅ friendly.
Staff✅👍. Co-operative, pleasant.
Overall .( 4.5 - -5⭐️.)
Comment **** pretty good , nice big sites for even buses size. Infrastructure is good.
Tenters**** (Keep an eye on wind reports, heavy gusts over 50kmh can be expected, really secure your tents and Caravan awnings.
A value for money stay within walking distance to the nice beautiful beach with sea and blue sky! For tourist, good to drive for convenience and to visit the wollongong town centre
Conveniently located nextdoor to a beach and ocean baths. Perfect place to unwind and relax.
11 night stay in our caravan. Dog friendly, beach access, bike path system along the coast is fantastic as is the scenery.

We were recommended this park as new to the camper trailer business.|The park is right on the beach and has access onto the beach.|There is an on-site cafe for anyone who wants to have a test from cooking and it’s reasonably priced.|Main issue was the noise from the trains.|Facilities were clean and maintained. |Powered site was large plenty of room.

The Pantry was brilliant, all the team were so helpful and friendly, I must mention that the bacon and egg roll was easily the best I’ve ever had, I also had the chicken stroganoff which was also great, so a particular mention for Jess, the chef, but the whole gang were fantastic.
Absolutely love staying at this park. Right on the beach, clean amenities. Close to shops and services.  Have stayed here 3 times now and will definitely stay here again!

Great spot on the beach, cafe with a great selection and awesome takeaway specials. Everything was very clean.
You can rent bikes from the office and the park is right on a great bike path.
Lots of attractions all around. Check with the desk they had a to-do sheet even for wet weather.
Kids park 🏞️ s huge but aimed at the little ones.
Only down side for us was that our closest camp kitchen didn't have any seating.
The bathroom door locks  can be a little sticky.

Not a bad park with lots of extra space to park the trailer / caravan.
Grounds very unleveled, friendly staff, not much for kids to do...
Amenities are ok...
Great stay with huge campsites and powered sites available. Good value for money.
Had  c.v site . Large.size. ammenities clean . Will return.
Great self contained cabins

It is quite not crowded and peaceful

The lifeguard is also just in front of you so you feel safe.
Lunch at the pantry in the caravan park

I have been to many other holiday parks and this is average compared to them. It feels too expensive for what they offer. I was surprised that they don't have WiFi! I came here early on the first day, and the receptionist told me that they will text me when the room is ready, and they never did. Had to drive out and back in to check past my scheduled check-in time, it was ready, annoying. Overall, it is okay. Would I come back? Maybe not.

Perfect for those who do not want to travel a million miles to the beach. Particularly, if you have to pop back to Sydney for work. It could do with a bigger play area and children activities for holidays, but the beach is brilliant and further up the beach its dog friendly. Note: It can get a bit rough and windy on the beach. Book early if planning to stay in the holidays as it's gets full.

You get what you expect from a cabin.
We generally stay at hotels given I’m in the trade but the kids had more fun here.
Now looking to book future dates - kids are pushing us for it.

Currently staying here for 3 nights, this is the first night and i am struggling to see how i will last another day.
The cleanliness of this room is atrocious, i found 8 cockroaches, 2 big ant nests outside on the patio, broken timber on patio, broken tiles in side that move when walked on, walked in barefooted and by the time we got to the bathroom from the front door our feet were black, when greeted at reception we were told sorry we are to busy  to let you in early (an hr and a half) and just to drive to our parents camping site not even get in to the cabin mind you… sorry but clearly not busy enough as you did not clean the room we are staying in obviously. As you can see i grabbed a standard wet wipe not even a cleaning wipe and it was black after just one swipe. We had to vacuum and mop and still dont feel comfortable. I have an 11 month old and he could easily cut himself on the broken tiles, also onviously dont want my son all over the dirty floors…

Great Place at East Corrimal Tourist Caravan Park Site
Power & Water Sites Pet Friendly stay & Great Staff helpful with stuff loves near the Beach for Dogs ⛱️🐶
Stayed in an ensuite van site. I'm spoilt now.
Love it. We stay here a lot. The staff are lovely & the location is beautiful.
A great caravan park, dog friendly & close to the beach
Well kept park
A great place to visit and spend a few days, plenty of activities for the kids also
Everything good just a shame husband with walker was unable to access the beach.

Ce village de vacances offre différentes prestations qui vont du camping au mobile home en passant par les emplacements pour camping-cars. Nous avons essayé un mobile home. L'équipement est complet. Il y a même un barbecue à gaz. Toutefois l'isolation thermique est un peu faible pour l'hiver.

Went with a camper Sunday to Tuesday outside of school holidays in winter and was very quiet.  People rummaging through the recycle bins collecting bottles at midnight the only real annoyance.  Close to the beach and plenty of space.  Shower block was very clean and recently renovated.
Very good Camp kitchen and clean shower and toilet
Great clean dog friendly park. Very accomodating staff and a great location! We will be back.
Such a nice place to stay

Perfect holiday location for the family. Just a short walk to the beach, playgrounds, shops etc. Also just a short drive to many attractions and the heart of Wollongong. We loved our family holiday at Corrimal Beach Tourist Park. Cabins were great and loved being just across from the beach.
Stayed in one of the small cabins, was fine.  Nice location, price ok.  No entertainment, just wash and toilet block. Quiet area, right by the beach. Oh, and no internet so you'll need mobile data.
Couldn't rate the cabins as we stayed in a van. The park is well laid out, close to bike paths and local facilities. The facilities are clean and modern. Will definitely return.

A great location near the beach. We had a two bedroom cabin that had plenty of room for us. A Queen bed in one room and 2 bunk beds in the other. The kitchen had a good sized fridge, gas oven with cooktop and microwave. On the little veranda was a bbq however we didn’t use this as it was too cold outside.
Only an overnight stay this. I'm looking forward to coming back

Peach of a location, as for the park itself, it' has clean and tidy amenities plenty of space restaurant, play area for the tin-lids, some guests however don't much care for other folks quiet times,they think having a great time is more important!
L

The kids and I had a great first time on an unpowered tent site, right on the beach, hearing the waves while you sleep 💯 The facilities are modern and clean. Beautiful surroundings and plenty of eating options
We had car problems on long weekend one phone call and kind Narrelle found us a site to stay until we got the car fixed thanks so much the park had no faults we will come back again
Amazing place
Great location. Generous sized sites but no WiFi.
